notes: SHIP v1.14.312 - N-11 Work Active-Workspace v1 (owner 'compact then start N-11'). Work's landing gains ONE stateful emitter: a job/resume hero above the FIELD WORK library. NEW #wk-job-host div spliced into #work-grid above the FIELD WORK glabel; NEW wk_renderJob() populates it, called after the showMode('work') wk-grid add and inside wk_showGrid(). The hero is resolved from the SAME shared sources as the device-verified NOW ACTIVE BUILD hero - nowtab_resolveDep() for the deployment, deploy_computeDeployRollup() for rack/phase counts, activeContext_get() for the in-context rack - so the two headline surfaces can never contradict. ZERO fabrication: the rack line renders ONLY when activeContext's rack belongs to THIS deployment (same guard as the NOW hero); a freshly-scoped build (0%, no in-context rack) points the hero at its FIRST rack so the next tap STARTS the build (START BUILD / START RACK), otherwise TAP TO RESUME. RESUME target mirrors the proven NOW-hero path exactly: deploy_showRackDetail(dep,rack) when there is an in-context rack, else deploy_showDetail(dep) - the deployment's own detail screen (NOTE: deploy_showCommandCenter takes an ops-host container, not a deployment, so it is NOT the resume door; the earlier 'Command Center' recon note was imprecise). Both drill out of the wk-grid via deploy_ensureDeployPanelVisible() so the detail paints visibly. Meta line is data-honest: site . N racks . X done . Y active . (Z blocked, in fault-channel #ff2bd6) . pct% . phase (DEPLOY_PHASE_LABELS_FULL[leadingEdge]). NULL deployment -> a QUIET honest empty strip ('NO ACTIVE BUILD / Scope a job - your resume card appears here.'), slate not cyan, no competing CTA (scoping keeps its one door on Command / the Deploy card). IDLE-DARK: when a job exists, #pg-work gets .wk-hasjob, which dims the 12 library cards to opacity .56 + saturate(.72) so the hero is the sole lit surface; press/focus lights a card back to full. When there is NO job, no .wk-hasjob -> the library renders full-bright (the device-verified look is untouched at zero-state). Job card is role=button/tabindex=0/onclick, matching the 12 sibling .rf-card cards' exact a11y contract (they carry no onkeydown; omitted here to avoid nested-quote escaping risk). DEFERRED to later N-*: recents (no tool-MRU exists), 3-bucket categorization (9/12 cards ambiguous), phase stepper (=N-12). Gates: whole-file brace balance 11831/11831 (was 11802; +29 all from the new balanced CSS+JS), all 4 inline <script> blocks vm.Script-compile clean, version triple .311->.312 lockstep, CRLF preserved, ?legacy=1 byte-identical (every CSS selector is body.rd-scoped, #work-grid is display:none in legacy, and wk_renderJob() early-returns when !redesign_isOn() so it never mutates the legacy DOM). DEVICE-VERIFY (John - hard gate): (1) with an active deployment, open Work via bottom nav -> the ACTIVE BUILD hero shows above FIELD WORK with correct name/rack/counts/phase, tapping it resumes to the in-context rack (or deployment detail / first-rack START); (2) the 12 library cards read dimmed while the hero is present, and light up on tap; (3) with NO active deployment, the quiet 'NO ACTIVE BUILD' strip shows and the 12 cards are FULL bright; (4) ?legacy=1 unchanged. NEXT: N-12 phase stepper (backlog; John sequences).
